records.ety: [OE. philosophre, F. philosophe, L. philosophus, Gr. filo`sofos; fi`los loving + sofo`s wise. Cf. Philosophy.]

defs: One who philosophizes; one versed in, or devoted to, philosophy.
quotes: Then certain philosophers of the Epicureans, and of the Stoics, encountered him.

defs: One who reduces the principles of philosophy to practice in the conduct of life; one who lives according to the rules of practical wisdom; one who meets or regards all vicissitudes with calmness.
